mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BONUS_CRITERIA(BC_NUM, CLA_NUM, BC_CONTENT, BC_SCORE, BC_NOTE, USER_NUM) VALUES(#{bcNum}, #{claNum}, #{bcContent}, #{bcScore}, #{bcNote}, #{userNum})
mapper.select: SELECT B.*, C.CLA_TITLE FROM BONUS_CRITERIA B JOIN CLASS C ON B.CLA_NUM = C.CLA_NUM ORDER BY B.BC_REGDATE DESC
SELECT NVL(SUM(B.BC_SCORE), 0) FROM BONUS_CRITERIA B JOIN CLASSAPPLY CA ON B.CLA_NUM = CA.CLA_NUM WHERE CA.USER_NUM = #{userNum}
